vdot.title: VDOT
vdot.outOfRange: Time is outside the VDOT table range (30.0–85.0)

ageGrading.title: Age Grading
ageGrading.notAvailable: Age grading is not available for this distance. It requires standard road race distances (1 mile, 5K, 10K, half marathon, or marathon).
ageGrading.explainerText: Age grading adjusts your performance for age and sex, comparing it to the world record standard for your demographic. A higher percentage means a stronger performance relative to your age and sex.

ageComparison.title: Equivalent Performance by Age & Gender
ageComparison.description: Times that would achieve the same age-grading percentage at {{distance}}, across different ages and genders.

percentile.title: How Do You Compare?
percentile.fasterThan: You finished faster than {{pct}}% of {{distance}} runners
percentile.fasterThanGender: You finished faster than {{pct}}% of {{gender}} {{distance}} runners

results.prompt: Select a distance and enter your time to see results.
